candidates.title: OpenAI frontier models and Codex are now available on AWS
candidates.summary: OpenAI frontier models and Codex are now generally available on AWS, giving enterprises a new path to build with OpenAI through the AWS environments, controls, and procurement workflows they already use. Customers can get started with OpenAI on AWS and move faster from evaluation to production.

candidates.title: Building the infrastructure for the Intelligence Age in Michigan
candidates.summary: OpenAI breaks ground on a 1GW data center project in Michigan as part of Stargate, building AI infrastructure to expand access, create jobs, and support communities.

candidates.title: DuckDuckGo makes its ‘no-AI’ search engine easier to access as its traffic booms
candidates.summary: Alternative search engine DuckDuckGo launches 'no AI' web extensions for Chrome and Firefox users.

candidates.title: Erin Brockovich takes aim at data center secrecy
candidates.summary: Environmental activist Erin Brockovich has a new mission.
